resources.string: Warning: do not use third party tools to fetch pif.prop
spoofVendingSdk will not take effect when spoofVendingBuild is enabled.
pif.prop is likely outdated, consider fetching once to update it.
ROM sigened with testkey, enable spoofSignature is recommended.
ROM signed with releasekey, enabling spoofSignature might not be useful.
Spoof field in pif.prop, enabled by default.
Spoof system properties, enable when not using TrickyStore.
Custom keystore provider, enable when not using TrickyStore.
Spoof rom signature, enable when your rom is signed by testkey. You can check your rom signature by running this command:
Spoof sdk version to 32 if your device runs Android 13 or higher, it will not take effect if your device is running Android 12 or lower. This option can cause instability, disable by default.
For option with Play Store do spoofing to Play Store (com.android.vending), else spoofing to Droidguard (com.google.android.gms.unstable).
via GitHub, autopif run in GitHub action once a day, fast and reliable.
via autopif, autopif run locally in real time, could be problematic in some devices.
Sync secuirty patch date in pif.prop with TrickyStore security patch automatically.
Temporary disable injection to Droidguard and PlayStore, take effect immediately. Enable this when you only need sensitive prop handling from PIF.
